connector_limits.warning_message: SharePoint Data Ingestion supports a maximum of 10,000 sites. If your 'structured_searched_filter' approaches this limit, ingestion may fail. Please verify your site count via the SharePoint Admin Center.

features.name: SharePoint Federated Search
features.description: Just-in-time search where Gemini queries SharePoint on behalf of the signed-in user. Requires Delegated permissions.

translations.friendly_success: Federated Search is fully configured. Gemini has the required delegated read access.
translations.friendly_failure: Gemini cannot execute Federated Search. It is missing delegated read permissions.
translations.remediation_template: Navigate to Entra ID -> 'API Permissions' -> 'Microsoft Graph' -> 'Delegated permissions'. Add at least one of the following: `{missing_scopes}`. Grant admin consent.

features.name: SharePoint Data Ingestion
features.description: Allows Vertex AI Search to ingest, sync, and index SharePoint content in the background.

translations.friendly_success: Data Ingestion is fully configured. The background sync has the necessary Application permissions.
translations.friendly_failure: Gemini cannot sync SharePoint data. It is missing core Application-level ingestion scopes.
translations.remediation_template: For Ingestion, add the Application permissions: `{missing_scopes}`. NOTE: If utilizing 'Sites.Selected' for security, your SharePoint Admin must also use the SharePoint REST API or PnP PowerShell to explicitly grant this app access to the targeted site collections.

features.name: SharePoint Chat with Files (Download Action)
features.description: Enables the 'Download Document' action, allowing the Gemini assistant to temporarily download and chat with file contents (e.g., CSV, XLSX).

translations.friendly_success: Chat with Files is configured. Gemini has the required permissions to download and read file contents.
translations.friendly_failure: Users can find files but cannot chat with them. Gemini is missing the Graph API permissions required for the 'Download Document' action.
translations.remediation_template: To enable chatting with files, ensure the 'Download Document' action is enabled in the Google Cloud Console. In Entra ID, add at least one of these Delegated permissions: `{missing_scopes}` and grant admin consent.

features.name: SharePoint Content Creation (Upload/Create Actions)
features.description: Enables Gemini to write back to SharePoint (e.g., 'Upload Document', 'Create Folder', 'Update Document').

translations.friendly_success: Content Creation is configured. Users can ask Gemini to save AI-generated drafts directly back to SharePoint folders.
translations.friendly_failure: Users cannot save files back to SharePoint. Gemini is missing file write permissions.
translations.remediation_template: To allow Gemini to create and update files, add the Delegated permissions: `{missing_scopes}` in Entra ID and grant admin consent.

features.name: SharePoint List Automation (Add List Item)
features.description: Enables Gemini to interact with structured SharePoint Lists (e.g., 'Create List Item', 'Get List Items').

translations.friendly_success: List Automation is configured. Gemini can read and write to SharePoint Lists.
translations.friendly_failure: Gemini cannot update SharePoint Lists. It lacks site management permissions.
translations.remediation_template: To enable list and site automation workflows, add the Delegated permissions: `{missing_scopes}` in Entra ID and grant admin consent.
